title: Launch decision narrower-default automation
description: Machine-readable rules for the narrower-default automation that fires against artifacts/governance/decision_register.yaml rows on their applies_on date. The register row already carries a narrower_default.posture and narrower_default.description; this document names the posture vocabulary, the auto-application rules (when a posture fires automatically versus when it requires a named forum's sign-off), the reviewer-guidance classes that route each row to ADR/RFC, sponsor scope decision, release decision, or narrowing-only governance note, and the report-projection rules tooling uses to render a sample freeze report that shows unresolved rows past their deadline as explicit narrow-scope outcomes rather than 'TBD'.

source_register.description: Repo-relative path to the register this automation applies to.

posture_vocabulary.description: Closed posture vocabulary. Mirrors schemas/governance/decision_index.schema.json#/$defs/default_if_unresolved.posture so consumers read one vocabulary across both registers.

auto_application_rules.description: Rules describing when the narrower_default posture fires automatically on applies_on, when it requires forum sign-off, and what recording obligations the firing imposes.

reviewer_guidance_classes.description: Reviewer-guidance classes routing each register row to ADR/RFC, sponsor scope decision, release decision, or narrowing-only governance note. A register row's decision_vehicle_class MUST resolve to exactly one class here.

report_projection_rules.description: Rules describing how tooling projects the register into the sample freeze report (fixtures/governance/decision_register/sample_freeze_report.yaml) so unresolved rows past their deadline appear as explicit narrow-scope outcomes rather than 'TBD'.

register_effect.description: What the register row's current_state becomes when the posture fires.

downstream_effect.description: What downstream artifacts (scorecard rows, claim manifest, release evidence, architecture pack) observe once the posture has fired.

recording_requirements.description: Artifacts and fields that MUST be updated when the rule fires.

forbidden_outcomes.description: Outcomes explicitly forbidden when the rule fires.

closes_by.description: What artifact or ruling closes a row in this class.

reviewer_next_action.description: Concrete next step a reviewer hitting an open row in this class should take.

example_register_rows.description: Launch-register ids that currently resolve to this class.

output_row_shape.description: Fields each projected row MUST carry. A projected row that leaves any of these fields empty is a reporting failure (emitting 'TBD' in place of a concrete narrow-scope outcome is explicitly forbidden).

forbidden_projections.description: Projections that tooling MUST refuse to emit.
